commit.subject: LU-19819: utils: fix 'lctl lfsck_query' usage message
commit.message:
LU-19819: utils: fix 'lctl lfsck_query' usage message

This commit fixes the 'lctl lfsck_query' usage message to correctly
list '-w' as short option for '--wait'
